mapper.sql: id, path_id, title, description, order_index, content_type, content_url, content_markdown, estimated_minutes, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learning_path_course WHERE path_id = #{pathId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_path_course (path_id, title, description, order_index, content_type, content_url, content_markdown, estimated_minutes, create_time) VALUES (#{pathId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{orderIndex}, #{contentType}, #{contentUrl}, #{contentMarkdown}, #{estimatedMinutes}, #{createTime})
